backstory.original: Paultin and his 'son' Simon (AKA Murderbot) have been adventuring as part of the Waffle Crew for many years. Paultin is a wise-cracking adventurer who is more at home at a tavern than anywhere else. He cares deeply for those he considers his friends and will leap into action if anyone hurts them.
backstory.display: 保尔丁和他的“儿子”西蒙（又名杀戮机器）多年来一直作为华夫饼小队的成员进行冒险。保尔丁是一名聪明的冒险家，他在酒馆里比在其他地方更有家的感觉。他非常关心那些他认为是朋友的人，如果有人伤害他们，他会立即付诸行动。

description.original: Simon attacks with a poisoned dart. Paultin attacks too, sometimes.
description.display: 西蒙使用剧毒飞镖发动攻击。有时保尔丁也会一起攻击。

description.original: Paultin swings the Sunsword, creating a shockwave that deals massive damage to all enemies.
description.display: 保尔丁挥舞太阳之剑，制造一道震荡波，对所有敌人造成高额伤害。

longDescription.original: Paultin swings the Sunsword, dealing massive damage to all enemies. The damage is increased by the current enemy enrage multiplier.
longDescription.display: 保尔丁挥舞太阳之剑，对所有敌人造成高额伤害。伤害会根据敌人的当前怒气系数而增加。

description.desc: $source increases the party's gold find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion adjacent to them.
每有一位勇士与$source相邻，即提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 队伍金币获得量

tipText.original: Paultin increases your party's gold find for each Champion adjacent to him.
tipText.display: 每位与保尔丁相邻的勇士均增加队伍的金币寻获。

description.desc: Paultin increases the damage of Champions not adjacent to him by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion that IS adjacent to him.

effect_keys.old_unused_override_key_desc: Increases the Damage of $target by $amount% for every Champion adjacent to Paultin

description.desc: 每有一位勇士与保尔丁相邻，即提升不与保尔丁相邻的所有勇士 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害

effect_keys.old_unused_override_key_desc: Increases the Damage of $target by $amount% for every Champion adjacent to Paultin

tipText.original: Paultin increases the damage of everyone not adjacent to him, based on the number of Champions that ARE adjacent to him!
tipText.display: 保尔丁使所有不与他相邻的盟友伤害提高，数值取决于与他相邻的勇士数量！

description.desc: Increase the damage of Waffle Crew members in the formation by $(not_buffed amount)% for each member of the Waffle Crew in the formation. (multiplicative, then buffed by $(upgrade_bonus 2037)%)

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $(not_buffed amount)% for every $(describe_tags tag) champion in the formation (multiplicative).  Total increased by $(upgrade_bonus 2037)%

description.desc: 阵型中每有一位华夫饼小队成员，即为所有华夫饼小队成员提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害（乘算后强化 $(upgrade_bonus 2037)%）

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 阵型中每有一名$(describe_tags tag)勇士，使$target的伤害提升 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。合计提升 $(upgrade_bonus 2037)%

specializationDescription.original: Paultin relies on the luck of the fortune-telling Vistani, increasing his gold find buff.
specializationDescription.display: 保尔丁依靠维斯塔尼预言者的运气，强化他的金币寻获增益。

specializationDescription.original: Paultin tracks down more magical secrets, further increasing your party's damage.
specializationDescription.display: 保尔丁追踪到更多神奇奥秘，进一步提高队伍的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the effect of Magical Secrets by $amount% if $source is on the edge of the formation.
如果$source处于阵型边缘，则提升 $amount% 神奇奥秘的效果

description.original: If not for me, do it for poor Simon.
description.display: 如果不是为我，那么就当是为了可怜的西蒙。

description.original: We've taken down Strahd, so we can take on anything!
description.display: 我们已经击倒了斯特拉德，我们可以搞定任何事！

description.original: Yeah, I can earn a few coins here and there.
description.display: 是的，我不管到哪里都可以挣点钱。

description.original: What can I say, people just love throwing coins at me.
description.display: 我能怎么说呢，人们就是喜欢往我身上扔钱。

description.original: I live a decent life and so too do those around me.
description.display: 我过着体面的生活，我周围的人也是如此。

description.original: I'll give you a hint: it's done with magic.
description.display: 我给你个提示：这与魔法有关。

description.original: What do you mean you're out? I see plenty of wine over there!
description.display: 什么叫你喝完了？我看到那边还有很多酒！

description.original: Common bagpipes with a goat skin bag.
description.display: 很普通的风笛，存放在羊皮袋中。

description.original: These bagpipes have blackwood pipes for a more uniform sound.
description.display: 此风笛的管子是用黑木制作的，所发出的笛声会更加齐整。

name.display: 旅行的吟游诗人的风笛

description.original: The Rusty Pommel wasn't that seedy of a tavern, was it?
description.display: 锈斑柄首这家酒馆还不赖吧？

description.original: Did I ever tell you about the time I turned into a spirit raven and met the Raven Queen?
description.display: 不知道我是否告诉过你我有一次变身成了魂鸦并且碰见了鸦后的经历？

description.original: It's mostly better than box wine. Mostly.
description.display: 至少比盒装酒来得好一点。好一点点。

name.display: 反复使用过的葡萄酒囊

description.original: There really aren't a lot of wine options in Barovia.
description.display: 巴洛维亚人喝的酒来来去去就几种。

description.original: Simon! Can you fetch Dad some more wine?
description.display: 西蒙！可以给爹多打些酒来不？

description.original: The best cure for a hangover is to keep drinking.
description.display: 对付宿醉的最佳良药就是继续喝不要停。

description.original: Both creepy AND comfortable!
description.display: 感觉有点鸡皮疙瘩又有点舒舒坦坦的！

description.original: A perfect drinking chair.
description.display: 坐上去喝酒最合适不过了。

description.original: This really was a great idea. I like drunk Strix.
description.display: 真是个好主意。我就喜欢醉酒的斯崔克丝。

name.display: 勇士斯特拉德·冯·扎罗维奇

description.original: Chair Richten never had a chance.
description.display: 里奇滕做梦都得不到的椅子。

description.original: An old cog and a family signet ring, bound by a leather strap.
description.display: 一条皮带串联着一个陈旧的齿轮和一枚家族图章戒指。

description.original: A clockwork machine piece and a noble family signet ring.
description.display: 一个齿轮样子的机械玩意和一枚贵族图章戒指。

name.display: 黄金齿轮与马坦恩图章戒指

description.original: These aren't just trinkets - they are pieces of her soul.
description.display: 这些不只是是小饰品那么简单--它们可都是她的灵魂的一部分。

description.original: You're back now. That's what matters.
description.display: 你回来了。这就足够了。

description.original: This old hilt appears to have once had a crystal blade
description.display: 这个陈旧的刀柄上似乎曾经镶嵌过一把水晶刀刃。

description.original: The initials 'S.V.Z' are engraved upon the pommel.
description.display: 刀柄上刻着“谢·冯·扎”三个字。

description.original: Ezmerelda's final gift.
description.display: 艾丝美拉达的最重馈赠。

description.original: It's not every day you stab your shadow and get shot back through time.
description.display: 捅自己的影子却反而被反击这种事真不是天天能见到的。

description.original: This mandolin is out of tune.
description.display: 这个曼陀林琴已经弹奏不起来了。

description.original: A well-tuned mandolin.
description.display: 精心调校过的曼陀林琴。

description.original: I lost this during 'Bomb Voyage' trying to save my friends. Again.
description.display: 我又一次为了拯救朋友而在“轰炸之旅”途中丢失了它。

name.display: 杰斯珀心爱的曼陀林琴

description.original: I'll put this to better use than Jesper ever could.
description.display: 相比杰斯珀，我才能真正发挥出此乐器的能力。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Chaotic Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Paultin and his 'son' Simon (AKA Murderbot) have been adventuring as part of the Waffle Crew for many years. Paultin is a wise-cracking adventurer who is more at home at a tavern than anywhere else. He cares deeply for those he considers his friends and will leap into action if anyone hurts them.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Paultin buffs your champions and increases gold find based on adjacencies. His ultimate damage scales up with the peril the party faces.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 保尔丁和他的“儿子”西蒙（又名杀戮机器）多年来一直作为华夫饼小队的成员进行冒险。保尔丁是一名聪明的冒险家，他在酒馆里比在其他地方更有家的感觉。他非常关心那些他认为是朋友的人，如果有人伤害他们，他会立即付诸行动。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 保尔丁会为你的勇士提供增益，并根据距离提高金币寻获量。他的杀招伤害会随着队伍所面临的威胁而增加。

original.name: Poison Dart
original.description: Simon attacks with a poisoned dart. Paultin attacks too, sometimes.

display.name: 剧毒飞镖
display.description: 西蒙使用剧毒飞镖发动攻击。有时保尔丁也会一起攻击。

original.name: Thunderwave
original.description: Paultin swings the Sunsword, creating a shockwave that deals massive damage to all enemies.
original.long_description: Paultin swings the Sunsword, dealing massive damage to all enemies. The damage is increased by the current enemy enrage multiplier.

display.name: 雷鸣波
display.description: 保尔丁挥舞太阳之剑，制造一道震荡波，对所有敌人造成高额伤害。
display.long_description: 保尔丁挥舞太阳之剑，对所有敌人造成高额伤害。伤害会根据敌人的当前怒气系数而增加。

original.name: Lucky
original.tip_text: Paultin increases your party's gold find for each Champion adjacent to him.

display.name: 幸运
display.tip_text: 每位与保尔丁相邻的勇士均增加队伍的金币寻获。

original.name: Magical Secrets
original.tip_text: Paultin increases the damage of everyone not adjacent to him, based on the number of Champions that ARE adjacent to him!

display.name: 神奇奥秘
display.tip_text: 保尔丁使所有不与他相邻的盟友伤害提高，数值取决于与他相邻的勇士数量！

original.specialization_description: Paultin relies on the luck of the fortune-telling Vistani, increasing his gold find buff.

display.specialization_description: 保尔丁依靠维斯塔尼预言者的运气，强化他的金币寻获增益。

original.specialization_description: Paultin tracks down more magical secrets, further increasing your party's damage.

display.specialization_description: 保尔丁追踪到更多神奇奥秘，进一步提高队伍的伤害。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: If not for me, do it for poor Simon.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 如果不是为我，那么就当是为了可怜的西蒙。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: We've taken down Strahd, so we can take on anything!

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我们已经击倒了斯特拉德，我们可以搞定任何事！

original.name: Frugal
original.description: Yeah, I can earn a few coins here and there.

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 是的，我不管到哪里都可以挣点钱。

original.name: Lucky
original.description: What can I say, people just love throwing coins at me.

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 我能怎么说呢，人们就是喜欢往我身上扔钱。

original.name: Observant
original.description: What do you mean you're out? I see plenty of wine over there!

display.name: 洞察
display.description: 什么叫你喝完了？我看到那边还有很多酒！

original.name: Knowable Secrets
original.description: I'll give you a hint: it's done with magic.

display.name: 可知的秘密
display.description: 我给你个提示：这与魔法有关。

original.name: Charmed Life
original.description: I live a decent life and so too do those around me.

display.name: 荣幸一生
display.description: 我过着体面的生活，我周围的人也是如此。

original.name: Patchwork Bagpipes
original.description: Common bagpipes with a goat skin bag.

display.name: 拼缝的风笛
display.description: 很普通的风笛，存放在羊皮袋中。

display.name: 黑木风笛
display.description: 此风笛的管子是用黑木制作的，所发出的笛声会更加齐整。

original.name: Bagpipes of the Traveling Bard
original.description: The Rusty Pommel wasn't that seedy of a tavern, was it?

display.name: 旅行的吟游诗人的风笛
display.description: 锈斑柄首这家酒馆还不赖吧？

original.name: Barovian Ceremonial Bagpipes
original.description: Did I ever tell you about the time I turned into a spirit raven and met the Raven Queen?

display.name: 巴洛维亚仪式风笛
display.description: 不知道我是否告诉过你我有一次变身成了魂鸦并且碰见了鸦后的经历？

original.name: Questionable Wineskin
original.description: It's mostly better than box wine. Mostly.

display.name: 不靠谱的葡萄酒囊
display.description: 至少比盒装酒来得好一点。好一点点。

original.name: Heavily-used Wineskin
original.description: There really aren't a lot of wine options in Barovia.

display.name: 反复使用过的葡萄酒囊
display.description: 巴洛维亚人喝的酒来来去去就几种。

original.name: Minstrel's Wineskin
original.description: Simon! Can you fetch Dad some more wine?

display.name: 吟游诗人的葡萄酒囊
display.description: 西蒙！可以给爹多打些酒来不？

original.name: Wizards of the Wineskin
original.description: The best cure for a hangover is to keep drinking.

display.name: 葡萄酒囊法师团
display.description: 对付宿醉的最佳良药就是继续喝不要停。

original.name: Broken Antique Chair
original.description: Both creepy AND comfortable!

display.name: 损坏的古董椅子
display.description: 感觉有点鸡皮疙瘩又有点舒舒坦坦的！

original.name: Animated Gothic Chair
original.description: A perfect drinking chair.

display.name: 活化哥特式椅子
display.description: 坐上去喝酒最合适不过了。

original.name: Strahd von Chairovich
original.description: This really was a great idea. I like drunk Strix.

display.name: 斯特拉德·冯·扎罗维奇
display.description: 真是个好主意。我就喜欢醉酒的斯崔克丝。

original.name: Champion Strahd von Chairovich
original.description: Chair Richten never had a chance.

display.name: 勇士斯特拉德·冯·扎罗维奇
display.description: 里奇滕做梦都得不到的椅子。

original.name: Leather Keepsake Necklace
original.description: An old cog and a family signet ring, bound by a leather strap.

display.name: 纪念性皮质项链
display.description: 一条皮带串联着一个陈旧的齿轮和一枚家族图章戒指。

original.name: Memento Necklace
original.description: A clockwork machine piece and a noble family signet ring.

display.name: 纪念性项链
display.description: 一个齿轮样子的机械玩意和一枚贵族图章戒指。

original.name: Golden Cog & Marthain Signet
original.description: These aren't just trinkets - they are pieces of her soul.

display.name: 黄金齿轮与马坦恩图章戒指
display.description: 这些不只是是小饰品那么简单--它们可都是她的灵魂的一部分。

original.name: Soulmate Necklace
original.description: You're back now. That's what matters.

display.name: 知己项链
display.description: 你回来了。这就足够了。

original.name: Iron Hilt
original.description: This old hilt appears to have once had a crystal blade

display.name: 铁质刀柄
display.description: 这个陈旧的刀柄上似乎曾经镶嵌过一把水晶刀刃。

original.name: Platinum Hilt
original.description: The initials 'S.V.Z' are engraved upon the pommel.

display.name: 白金刀柄
display.description: 刀柄上刻着“谢·冯·扎”三个字。

original.name: The Sunsword
original.description: Ezmerelda's final gift.

display.name: 太阳神剑
display.description: 艾丝美拉达的最重馈赠。

original.name: Sunsword of Sergei von Zarovich
original.description: It's not every day you stab your shadow and get shot back through time.

display.name: 谢尔盖·冯·扎罗维奇
display.description: 捅自己的影子却反而被反击这种事真不是天天能见到的。

original.name: Weathered Mandolin
original.description: This mandolin is out of tune.

display.name: 风化的曼陀林琴
display.description: 这个曼陀林琴已经弹奏不起来了。

original.name: Mandolin of the Vistani
original.description: A well-tuned mandolin.

display.name: 维斯塔尼的曼陀林琴
display.description: 精心调校过的曼陀林琴。

original.name: Ornate Canaith Mandolin
original.description: I lost this during 'Bomb Voyage' trying to save my friends. Again.

display.name: 华丽的藤蔓曼陀林琴
display.description: 我又一次为了拯救朋友而在“轰炸之旅”途中丢失了它。

original.name: Jesper's Prized Mandolin
original.description: I'll put this to better use than Jesper ever could.

display.name: 杰斯珀心爱的曼陀林琴
display.description: 相比杰斯珀，我才能真正发挥出此乐器的能力。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
使所有人类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Chaotic Champions by $(amount)%
使所有混乱阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
